title: Generic Queue

statement.markdown:
## Generic Queue

A generic queue is a data structure that follows the FIFO (First-In-First-Out) principle. Implement a generic queue in TypeScript that can hold elements of any type.

constraints: The queue should be implemented using a class.
The queue should have methods to enqueue and dequeue elements.
The queue should handle edge cases such as empty queue, null/undefined elements, etc.
